title: teucrium helichrysoides
intro: Teucrium helichrysoides, also known as the Greek germander, is a plant species within the Lamiaceae family, native to the Mediterranean region. This herb is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Teucrium helichrysoides include reducing inflammation, improving digestive issues, and supporting the immune system. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and has been used in traditional medicine for centuries to treat various ailments.
